race.description: BECOME A BRC MEMBER MAIDEN PLATE
race.comment: NSW galloper PYROLYSIS (8) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in all five starts to date and strikes a very winnable contest here. Revved up for this with a recent trial and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky alley to be playing a major role in the outcome. The well-related GRAM (1) (full to G3 winner Zulfiqar) will be better with that first-up effort now under the belt and gets the services of Maloney in the irons. Looms as the main danger. YOWERI (5) just missed the frame when having the first run for the new stable and gets the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. Top-three credentials. MAGIC INVADER (3) has placed three of four over this sprint journey and is a must for the multiples. SWORD OF LEGACY (10) next in line from the favourable draw.
